stories: Good evening Sean, it's Sunday evening, the seventeenth of May 2026
Nature's been running that algorithm for millennia
Tomorrow's Monday and Day One of your GBSLT Quarterly at Shangri-La The Fort Manila
A new consumer survey also shows Singaporeans are bracing for higher inflation in 2026 despite slowing growth, as global energy prices feed through to household costs
A drone struck the UAE's Barakah nuclear power plant, the first attack on a Gulf nuclear facility in this conflict
UAE says the plant is offline with no radiological risk, but this is a significant geographic and symbolic escalation
Iran's Revolutionary Guard Corps also issued a fresh warning today: any vessel crossing the Strait without coordinating with Iran will be categorically dealt with
Almost no shipping is moving through Hormuz, and Trump's Operation Project Freedom escort mission remains paused since May the sixth, with the White House citing back-channel progress
Good morning Sean, it's Sunday, the seventeenth of May 2026
Today is your quiet day before the GBSLT Quarterly gets underway tomorrow
Fun fact to kick off your Sunday: asteroid 2026 JH2, up to 115 feet wide, flies past Earth tomorrow closer than some of our own satellites
Completely safe, but you can actually watch it live via livestream tonight
Singapore news: dengue cases are down 66 percent year on year through mid-May, just over 600 cases and well managed
Tourism spending is expected to soften despite rising arrivals as global uncertainty makes visitors more cautious
And Singapore's Ministry of Education confirmed on Friday that no sensitive student data was compromised in the Canvas learning platform breach
US-Israeli strikes triggered Iran's closure of the Strait of Hormuz, pushing oil above $100 a barrel
Good evening Sean, it's Saturday evening, the sixteenth of May 2026
Tonight's fun fact: the ancient Anglo-Saxons called May the Month of Three Milkings √¢¬Ä¬î spring grass so rich and plentiful that cows could be milked three times a day
You have Jackets for Manila Team at nine-thirty in the morning, then SQ 916 departs Singapore at one-thirty, arriving in Manila around five-twenty-five
There's a pre-read time block during the flight at two-thirty, and a VIP meet and greet with hotel transfer at seventeen-thirty local time
You're then straight into the GBSLT Quarterly at Shangri-La The Fort Manila, running all the way through to Friday the twenty-third
It's a full week ahead √¢¬Ä¬î pack well tonight
In Singapore today, two stories worth noting
Canadian R&B artist Daniel Caesar kicked off his 2026 world tour in the city tonight √¢¬Ä¬î good energy around the bay
